p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem WHO PreQualification Database Metadata v0.2.0 (CodeSystem)

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://smart.who.int/pcmt-vaxprequal/CodeSystem/PreQualDatabaseMetadata"><version value="0.2.0"><code value="LiquidReadytouse"><display value="Liquid: Ready to use"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Lyophilised active component to be reconstituted with excipient diluent before use

button.title: Click to Copy as Coding
